top_signals.title: Old Pulteney releases 50-year-old whisky for 200th anniversary
top_signals.summary: Old Pulteney is marking its 200th anniversary with the release of two exceptionally rare single malts, including the oldest whisky ever bottled by the historic Highland distillery. The Wick-based producer has unveiled a 50-year-old and a 30-year-old single malt to celebrate two centuries of whisky-making on Scotland’s rugged northern coastline. The limited-edition expressions have been [...]

top_signals.title: Resouro PEA points to $1B potential rare earth and titanium project
top_signals.summary: The Tiros project in Minas Gerais, Brazil, hosts 1.4 billion tonnes in the measured and indicated categories.

top_signals.title: UK to ban social media access for children under 16
top_signals.summary: The ban will apply to all “user-to-user platforms, whose purpose is to enable social interaction and which allow users to post material, alongside algorithms,” according to a press release from the government’s Department for Science, Innovation and Technology.
